summary: Frontend-only test of 6 new client-friendly editor UX features. All 6 features verified end-to-end using super-admin login + wifetobe site + home/about pages. No regressions detected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Editor UX features (coach overlay, status bar, preview, reset, softer publish wording) verified against wifetobe site. Editable text inside the iframe uses [data-eid][contenteditable] pattern (from EDITOR_INJECT in backend/server.py) — direct DOM-simulated text edit was not attempted; setJustSaved(true) fires on text save (App.js line 1524), so status-saved badge appears via the existing textSave handler. Reset endpoint POST /api/pages/{site}/{page}/reset works.

status_bar.clean_draft_wording: You're editing a private draft. Nothing goes live until you press Publish.

verified_features.empty_state_hint: CSS-only; editor renders normally, no breakage observed
